# Workshop Scratch Book

I want to build a small Spring Boot + Vaadin application for showing Ireland rent data for the last five years across counties.

Lets use H2 database and seed it using the dataset from the repo dataset/irish_rent_by_country.csv

The main idea is to have a rent analytics dashboard, but instead of putting everything into one page, we can split the dashboard into two pages so the UI looks cleaner in Vaadin.

Page 1: Rent Overview Dashboard

This page should show the main summary information:

* Latest year average rent
* County with the highest rent
* County with the lowest rent
* Fastest growing county over the available years
* A line chart for the top 5 most expensive counties
* A line chart for the 5 least expensive counties

Page 2: Rent Growth and Ranking Dashboard

This page should focus more on comparison and ranking:

* A bar chart showing county rent ranking for the latest year
* A bar chart showing rent growth percentage by county over the available years
* A line chart showing national average rent trend year by year

Page 3: Custom Graph Builder

This page should allow the user to select:

* From year
* To year
* Up to 3 counties

After clicking a button, it should generate a line chart comparing the selected counties across the selected year range.

Keep the application simple and demo-friendly. The goal is to show how agents can take a basic requirement and create a working Vaadin application with useful dashboards.
